subject: [PATCH 4/8] nfsd: guard nfsd_serv deref in nfsd_file_net_dispose

2026-06-01.patch_summary: This patch fixes a bug in the nfsd service thread loop where it attempts to wake up another thread by calling svc_wake_up(nn->nfsd_serv) even when nn->nfsd_serv is NULL. The fix involves loading nn->nfsd_serv into a local pointer and only calling svc_wake_up() if the pointer is non-NULL, matching the pattern in nfsd_file_dispose_list_delayed(). This patch addresses an issue introduced by a previous commit that left work of closing files to a work queue.
